title: ToiletTree Products Pocket Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush
description: Use ToiletTree Products Pocket-Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush, a space-saving dental dynamo to help keep your teeth clean and healthy when you’re away from home. Put yourself on the road to better dental health and keep one at your office, in your car, in your purse, or toss one in your backpack. Now you don’t have to leave your home without a way to keep your mouth and teeth feeling and looking great. You’ll have fresh breath, clean teeth, and a dental routine that will have you bragging to your dentist.
features: This waterproof, easy-to-clean travel pocket-size toothbrush has 18,000 sonic brush strokes per minute to help keep your gums and teeth healthy and bright when you’re away from home

Adults and kids alike love the everyday firm and effective cleaning power of this compact dental tool; take this battery-operated sonic toothbrush anywhere; perfect for travel and everyday use on the go

Small but powerful, store this travel toothbrush with the cap snapped into place to protect the high-quality DuPont bristles; keep it in your pocket, purse, or backpack for a quick brush-up whenever you wish
Powered by 1 AAA battery (not included), this compact toothbrush lasts a long time before changing the battery; use it for 2 minutes each day and it will last more than 120 days, or about 4 months
Gentle but effective brush head keeps your teeth fresh and clean so you can smile with confidence all day long; BPA-free

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...
reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.

title: Oral-B 8000 Electric Toothbrush with Bluetooth Connectivity, White
description: Use the Oral-B App to seamlessly pair your Genius 8000 with a smartphone and you're on your way to brushing like your dentist recommends. The Oral-B Genius 8000 comes with Position Detection technology which uses Bluetooth technology, your smartphone, and facial recognition technology to provide you with real-time feedback about your brushing habits. The 360 Smarting with LED lights allows you to personalize your brushing experience with your choice of 12 colors. The Smarting works with the integrated timer and pressure sensor to provide you with visual feedback on brushing time and brushing pressure. Together, they help you ensure you brush for the recommended 2-minutes while making sure you brush with appropriate pressure to protect your gums from over-brushing. The premium Smart Travel Case lets you charge your brush and smartphone (via USB) at the same time while using only one wall plug. The Genius features 6 brushing modes so you can further customize your brushing experience based on your specific oral care goals. This highly advanced brush features a dentist-inspired round head that surrounds and cups each tooth with dynamic oscillating, rotating and pulsating movements to remove up to 500% more plaque than a regular manual toothbrush. Trust in the precision engineering of Braun and the dental expertise of Oral-B, the #1 brand used and recommended by dentists worldwide. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
features: Position Detection to help you know where you've brushed, so you never miss a zone
Multicolor Smarting on electric toothbrush provides coaching on brushing time
Pressure sensor technology slows brush speed to protect gums
Rechargeable with 6 cleaning modes allow you to brush based on your needs
Smart Travel toothbrush case for dual cell phone and brush handle charging

reviews.title: Tb
reviews.text: Stop working after two months. What a waste.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
for a top model priced as such, i was a disappointed in the feature set....no UV system to sterilize the brush head. Travel pack and main stand run on two different power systems...travel pack runs on 100-240v (universal) and main stand only runs on 110v (NA).

Does anyone know the point of the tongue mode being at the very bottom of the mode switch list? i brush my teeth and brush my tongue so the tongue mode should have been immediately after the regular brush mode

a few days use on a single charge. great build. grippy soft handle.

reviews.title: Some new features, brush works well.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is much like my old one, only this one is black. It does have a blue tooth thing that is so-so. It was a little cumbersome to get the app to work, (and had to get a new phone). The interaction between myself, the tooth brush, and the phone seems to be lacking. I envisioned real time brushing animation or something. This just times you through the selected areas. It is nice to get the bushing too hard feature well to know its there, and works. I miss the second speed my old one had this one only has one speed. I like that I can use my phone to help to remind me of my brushing responsibilities. The travel case is a nice feature as well. The design and function of this brush works well as does my old one. I was just expecting something a little more.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Product arrived in time and exactly as presented on amazon

reviews.title: powerful toothbrush but a bit gimmicky
reviews.text:
I upgraded to this toothbrush from a vibrating-head type. The difference in cleaning-power feels dramatic. It has several different speeds for brushing teeth, gums, tongue, etc. By default, the light will blink and the toothbrush pause at certain intervals to ensure you spend enough time brushing different areas. This can be further customized with the Bluetooth unit and application. This is a neat novelty, and may be good for encouraging children to learn to brush correctly. To be honest though, when in a rush in the morning, I am not likely to take the extra step of using a phone app while brushing my teeth, and I also prefer not to take up another plug, as it’s not integrated with the charging base.

Overall I like the toothbrush a lot, but next time around, I would likely get the less expensive model without the phone accessories.

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: Order if you know the product!

I would recommend to anyone buying this per as the advise of a dentist and also be aware that the touch and feeling is not similar to regular ones and may take a while to get used.
So far I love this toothbrush and will keep using it forever.

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Wobbling brush head
reviews.text: Trickey folding mechanism. The brush head wobbles once opened. This wobbling makes it cumbersome to use. I just bought two with similar folding mechanism form Big Lots for less than 2 dollars each. They feel sturdy in my hand, no wobble, no difficulty unfolding the brush head. I do like the odd big soft brush head of this particular tooth brush. It cleans well.

reviews.title: This is the best toothbrush I had
reviews.text: Although I liked a particular type of toothbrush, although the bristles on this one aren't my first choice they are separated I'm such way that makes brushing easy even while walking. Thank you who ever made this charm!!!

title: Pop Sonic Electric Toothbrush with Travel Case (Teal) - Soft Electric Toothbrushes Keeps Mouth Fresh All-Day Toothbrush w/ 2 Speed - 18,000-24,000 Strokes/Minute Vibrations
features: Portable Electric Toothbrush With Case: Our battery operated toothbrush for adults and kids keeps your mouth fresh all day. This kit includes 1 x soft bristle electric toothbrush handle, 2 x Brush Heads with Nylon Bristles, 1 x Toothbrush Case, One AAA Battery, & Instruction Manual.

Gives Perfect Strokes: Our tooth brushes for teeth electric feature 2 speeds (to control your cleaning) with vibrations from 18,000 to 24,000 brush strokes per minute. These electric travel toothbrushes contain an easy-to-use on / off switch.

Styling Carrying Case: This portable toothbrush electric comes with its own carrying case making travel toothbrushes ideal for on-the-go oral care. The stylish electric toothbrush carrying case protects from unclean surfaces and avoids spillage from a wet toothbrush after use.

Great for Kids Too: With our whitening toothbrush, handy carrying case, and selection of bright colors, kids will love the Go Plus Sonic Toothbrush. Perfectly sized electric toothbrush for kids 8-12 or above that fits smaller hands for younger, more sensitive mouths.

Durable, Develop Healthy Brushing Habits: These oral hygiene products are programmed with a quadrant pacer and a 2-minute timer. Our travel electric toothbrushes for adults and kids are made with high-quality and long-lasting DuPont nylon bristles for longer life.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush with a travel case
reviews.text: Nice toothbrush with a travel case. The vibrations are weaker than expected.  I like the timer.  We'll see if the dentist notices a difference.

reviews.title: Great toothbrush to take for travel
reviews.text: I hate when having to choose to use a regular stationary toothbrush, or my big rechargeable toothebrush when traveling. This toothbrush was perfect to take with me on my last trip as it is small, lightweight, sleek with the rose gold design, and comes with a really nice and compact case. Another huge plus is that it is really very quiet when it is on, so you don't risk having to wake others up. It is a great choice for a travel toothbrush.

reviews.title: Worked out well for our Kits
reviews.text: Each year we put together kits for the unhomed.  These work well as they're individually packaged.  Would definitely buy again.  But would appreciate a discount of some kind to help us provide more kits in the future.

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

Bring your child's favorite stories to life with this adorable plush Torah . Help them discover their favorite stories and explore their imagination through playtime. This toy is super soft, cuddly, and great for imaginative play. Made of high-quality materials and embroidered with the Ten Commandments on the front - it's perfect for both boys and girls.

Soft and huggable, this small Plush Torah toy makes a wonderful gift for young kids and toddlers. Embroidered with the symbolic image of the Ten Commandments on front, it's a memorable product that will be treasured by children for many years.

Fit for both electric toothbrushes and manual toothbrushes (Adults/Kids).

▲ ONE BUTTON OPERATION - One button to control the power and function, working time is 6 mins for one time, it will automatically stops when uncover the lid or work is done. Built-in rechargeable battery that lasts up to 30 days after full charged.

▲ NO DRILLING INSTALLATION - Wipe the smooth wall surface with wet cloth and make it dry thoroughly, then stick the two hooks included package on the wall and wait 24 hours before you hang the toothbrush holder on the hooks. Easy to install without damaging the wall.

title: COSLUS Kids Sonic Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush: Interactive Smart LED Light Toddler Silicone Tooth Brush (Bluelue)
features: 🌟INTERACTIVE FUN BRUSHING: Featuring cute cartoon character design and rainbow LED lights, COSLUS electric toothbrush makes brushing more fun and easier for boys and girls ages 3+. Your children will be rewarded with a star after each successful brushing, which can motivate them to collect all the stars, fall in love with brushing teeth, and enjoy endless fun with cute characters. Studies show that 93% of parents prefer an interactive toothbrush to develop their child's healthy brushing habits

⏰BUILDS HEALTHY BRUSHING HABITS: Based on the professional advice of brushing teeth twice a day for two minutes each time, COSLUS toothbrush sets the smart timer to 2min and lightly vibrates every 30 seconds to remind child to switch to another part of the teeth, thoroughly clean their oral, and develop correct habits. Meanwhile, our toothbrush has 3 cleaning modes with memory function: deep clean, soft clean and massage, you can choose the right mode according to your child's needs

✔️GENTLE & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Created in partnership with thousands of Professionals, COSLUS kids toothbrush is safe, effective and gentle on incoming teeth and sensitive gums. Ultra-low vibration, children will not feel numb when using. What's more, this toothbrush vibrates up to 31000 times/min, 100% more powerful than ordinary electric toothbrushes. And Come with 2 toothbrush heads: 1 soft bristle for sensitive gums, 1 standard bristle for deep cleaning

🎁Designed For Kids' Oral Development: The unique caterpillar-shaped silicone handle is comfortable and non-slip, more suitable for children's small hands. And widened tongue brush head is made of food-grade silicone to massage kids' tongue while cleaning effectively. In addition, the lock-type design can better prevent brush head from falling off, allowing kids to brush more safely independently. With IPX7 waterproof design, your children can directly rinse and soak it with water after brushing

⚡90 Days Long Endurance: This rechargeable kids electric toothbrush lasts up to 90 days after 2.5 hours of wireless charging, more convenient and faster. It highly reduces the hassle of frequent charging and battery replacement, easy to use at home and on the go. In addition, the average lifespan of our electric toothbrush is approximately 3 years, which is double the lifespan compared to other electric toothbrush

Tips: It is recommended to replace the brush head every three months. ---You can check the related information on the box, get 3 replacement brush heads --- Or buy other brush head sets at the COSLUS store to better experience this electric toothbrush

reviews.title: My grandson actually wants to brush now.
reviews.text:
This brush is fun, and my grandson actually wants to brush since we picked it up.

Brush vibrates quietly, bristles are stationary. As you brush the stars light up.
The goal is to brush long enough to get all the stars lit up.
When you change something into a game, it motivates kids to try to "win".

I like the concept. Charger and extra brush head included.

reviews.title: Great for my daughters toothbrush
reviews.text: We got the actual toothbrush a few months back and although it came with an extra head we wanted to be prepared because it is the only toothbrush my daughter likes to use.  They came packaged just fine and we got all three in perfect shape.  They are like her old heads for the toothbrush, not too hard and not too soft and they fit perfectly.  As long as my daughter still enjoys her specific tooth brush I will keep getting these for her.

reviews.text: This brush comes in nice packaging. It has 3 levels of brushing. My daughter loves to play around with different levels. It encourages her to brush her teeth every day. The brush is soft and the handle is easy ti grip. I could not ask for more. 5 stars for sure.
